response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive experience in software engineering and leadership, with 15+ years in the field, but her resume lacks direct AI/ML experience or demonstrated expertise in AI product development. Her background in cloud technologies and infrastructure is strong, and her entrepreneurial ventures show innovation, but the absence of clear AI strategy experience or recognized expertise in AI technologies lowers her fit for this role.
strengths: 15+ years of progressive software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, and cloud)
Proven leadership in technical innovation, including founding an open-source GIS platform and contributing to AI-agent infrastructure
Strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and cross-stack fluency (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, React, etc.)
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development experience or recognized expertise in AI technologies
Limited evidence of cloud or AI platform strategy work (current role focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than strategic AI platforms)
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field and no clear entrepreneurial experience in larger organizations
